message:
feat(scoring): expand tracker with comprehensive metrics

Enhance internal/scoring/tracker.go with extended tracking capabilities:
- Add new metric collection points (+192 lines)
- Comprehensive test coverage in tracker_test.go (+247 lines)

The tracker now provides more granular insight into scoring operations
for better debugging and performance analysis.
